race.comment: BLUE SHIELD (1) looks well placed off an encouraging debut at Geelong, right in the market there when showing speed before just fading late to be beaten 0.6 lengths. He'll be better for that and should take plenty of catching around here from the low gate. BULL RUN (2) resumes, making his local debut. He was well beaten into second at Salisbury in the UK on debut a year ago and may find this too sharp but has jumped out okay, respect the Waller polish. THE QUIET IMMORTAL (6) resumes having shown ability last time in, he'll be running on. PADDYPIE (4) is a gelding by Magnus on debut for the Payne yard who has trialled up nicely and looks set to run a good race. PRAVAHA (9) can be an improver second time around having been well backed on debut before a spell.
